result:
Here are all available MCP tools (all under the `mcp__ruflo-rag` server, plus 3 Google/Gmail auth tools):

**Google Auth (3)**
- `mcp__claude_ai_Gmail__authenticate`
- `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Calendar__authenticate`
- `mcp__claude_ai_Google_Drive__authenticate`

**ruflo-rag (197 tools across these namespaces):**

| Namespace | Tools |
|---|---|
| `agent_` | execute, health, list, pool, spawn, status, terminate, update |
| `agentdb_` | batch, causal-edge, consolidate, context-synthesize, controllers, feedback, health, hierarchical-recall, hierarchical-store, pattern-search, pattern-store, route, semantic-route, session-end, session-start |
| `aidefence_` | analyze, has_pii, is_safe, learn, scan, stats |
| `analyze_` | diff, diff-classify, diff-reviewers, diff-risk, diff-stats, file-risk |
| `autopilot_` | config, disable, enable, history, learn, log, predict, progress, reset, status |
| `claims_` | accept-handoff, board, claim, handoff, list, load, mark-stealable, rebalance, release, status, steal, stealable |
| `config_` | export, get, import, list, reset, set |
| `coordination_` | consensus, load_balance, metrics, node, orchestrate, sync, topology |
| `daa_` | agent_adapt, agent_create, cognitive_pattern, knowledge_share, learning_status, performance_metrics, workflow_create, workflow_execute |
| `embeddings_` | compare, generate, hyperbolic, init, neural, rabitq_build, rabitq_search, rabitq_status, search, status |
| `github_` | issue_track, metrics, pr_manage, repo_analyze, workflow |
| `guidance_` | capabilities, discover, quickref, recommend, workflow |
| `hive-mind_` | broadcast, consensus, init, join, leave, memory, shutdown, spawn, status |
| `hooks_` | build-agents, explain, init, intelligence, intelligence-reset, intelligence_attention, intelligence_learn, intelligence_pattern-search, intelligence_pattern-store, intelligence_stats, intelligence_trajectory-end, intelligence_trajectory-start, intelligence_trajectory-step, list, metrics, model-outcome, model-route, model-stats, notify, post-command, post-edit, post-task, pre-command, pre-edit, pre-task, pretrain, route, session-end, session-restore, session-start, transfer, worker-cancel, worker-detect, worker-dispatch, worker-list, worker-status |
| `mcp_` | status |
| `memory_` | bridge_status, delete, import_claude, list, migrate, retrieve, search, search_unified, stats, store |
| `neural_` | compress, optimize, patterns, predict, status, train |
| `performance_` | benchmark, bottleneck, metrics, optimize, profile, report |
| `progress_` | check, summary, sync, watch |
| `ruvllm_` | chat_format, generate_config, hnsw_add, hnsw_create, hnsw_route, microlora_adapt, microlora_create, sona_adapt, sona_create, status |
| `session_` | delete, info, list, restore, save |
| `swarm_` | health, init, shutdown, status |
| `system_` | health, info, metrics, reset, status |
| `task_` | assign, cancel, complete, create, list, status, summary, update |
| `terminal_` | close, create, execute, history, list |
| `transfer_` | detect-pii, ipfs-resolve, plugin-featured, plugin-info, plugin-official, plugin-search, store-download, store-featured, store-info, store-search, store-trending |
| `wasm_` | agent_create, agent_export, agent_files, agent_list, agent_prompt, agent_terminate, gallery_create, gallery_list, gallery_search |
| `workflow_` | cancel, create, delete, execute, list, pause, resume, run, status, template |

**Total: ~200 MCP tools available** (3 Google auth + ~197 ruflo-rag).
